title: Mace <1.21 displayer
description: This resource pack will allow you to see the mace on versions below 1.21
body:
To see the mace, you need to obtain the renamed version of the netherite axe : Netherite Axe -> 1.21 Mace

This resource pack was created so that you can see the mace model on lower versions than 1.21. **Important note! :** The Resource pack does not add a mace as an item, it changes the model of a netherite axe that is used as a mace on many PVP servers running on version 1.21, which can be accessed from lower versions. If for some reason you are not installing version 1.21, you can download this resource pack to see the mace on the servers.

Required/recommended mods
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home): Required for custom item textures and emissive textures.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn): Required for custom item textures when using fabric.
